name: Lentil and Buckwheat Slice
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Marmite (for the Brits amongst you)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and carrot, sauté in oil in a fairly large saucepan.
2. Add all other ingredients; bring to boil.
3. Simmer for 30 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
4. While step 3 is taking place, preheat oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
5. Put mixture in loaf/flan dish.
6. Put loaf/flan dish in the oven above.
7. Cook for 30 minutes.
Note: I see no reason why you would need to use oil; just cut up the carrots extra small, place all ingredients in the pan and start at step 2.
